headline: Can Chipotle's High-Efficiency Equipment Rollout Lift Comps?
summary: CMG is rolling out high-efficiency kitchen gear to boost throughput, with early installs showing 200-400 bps comp lift and better satisfaction.

raw.headline: Can Chipotle's High-Efficiency Equipment Rollout Lift Comps?

headline: People are using free apps to sue companies without having to hire a lawyer — and some claim they're getting thousands
summary: Toxic ingredients, a data breach, or defective products could mean you get a payout if you successfully file a claim on one of many settlement apps.
